Expend4bles (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,710,153Details
International Box Office $34,423,450
Worldwide Box Office $51,133,603
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,834,317
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,177,328
Total $9,011,645
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Armed with every weapon they can get their hands on and the skills to use them, The Expendables are the world’s last line of defense and the team that gets called when all other options are off the table. But new team members with new styles and tactics are going to give “new blood” a whole new meaning.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,039,021 (48.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.08 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,518 opening theaters/3,518 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $18,268,135

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 22nd, 2023 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: September 15th, 2023 (Wide) (China)
September 21st, 2023 (Wide), released as The Expend4bles (轟天猛將4) (Hong Kong)
September 21st, 2023 (Wide), released as Expend4bles: Postr4datelní (Czech Republic)
September 21st, 2023 (Wide), released as Os Mercen4rios (Portugal)
September 21st, 2023 (Wide), released as Los Indestructibles 4 (Mexico)
Video Release: October 13th, 2023 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong/bloody violence throughout, language and sexual material.
(Rating bulletin 2794 (cert #54351), 8/2/2023)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Franchise: The Expendables
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Filming location (city or town): London, England
Filming location (country): Bulgaria, England, Greece, United Kingdom
Plot point: Mercenaries
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Millennium Media, Nu Boyana, Templeton Media, Grobman Films , Media Capital Technologies
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
